featureName: Digest Date Scan Produces False Empty
statusReason: bubbles.implement (2026-07-24) landed the disjoint unit-verifiable false-empty core: the web /digest route now consumes the canonical typed internal/digest.Generator.GetLatest via an injected web.DigestReader, the duplicate DATE-to-string-scan + time.Now() catch-all is removed, and a closed typed DigestPageModel/DigestViewState distinguishes current/quiet/stale/first_use_empty/selected_date_empty/read_error so only a wrapped pgx.ErrNoRows renders empty (internal/web unit tests + go test ./... + lint all pass). BLOCKED on (1) COORDINATION-REQUIRED Scope 01 freshness/ownership SST which requires editing config files a concurrent agent owns, and (2) DEFERRED live-stack verification (all integration/e2e-api/e2e-ui rows + Scope 04) intentionally not run to avoid the shared Docker stack.
blockedReason: Disjoint unit-verifiable core is implemented and green (./smackerel.sh test unit --go -> go test ./... exit 0; ./smackerel.sh check exit 0; ./smackerel.sh lint exit 0). BLOCKED on TWO dependencies. (1) COORDINATION-REQUIRED: Scope 01 freshness/ownership SST (DIGEST_STALE_AFTER_HOURS positive-int no-default key + the digest:read/digest:generate grant contract) requires editing internal/config/config.go, internal/config/validate_test.go, config/smackerel.yaml, and scripts/commands/config.sh, which a CONCURRENT agent is actively editing; per the operator directive those files were NOT touched. Stale determination is therefore wired inert (web.Handler.DigestStaleAfter=0 in cmd/core/services.go) so a non-quiet row renders current rather than being arbitrarily called stale until the config work lands. UNBLOCK STEP: after the concurrent config-SST work merges, wire DigestStaleAfter from DIGEST_STALE_AFTER_HOURS + add the grant authorization boundary, then re-verify. (2) DEFERRED LIVE VERIFICATION: every integration/e2e-api/e2e-ui row was intentionally not run to avoid bringing up the shared Docker stack while other agents use the host daemon -- specifically the real-PostgreSQL DATE round-trip DIGEST-S02-T02, the scan-fault profile DIGEST-FP-DB-SCAN-001, the unauthorized/grant boundary SCN-002-007-07, and all of Scope 04 disposable browser acceptance. UNBLOCK STEP: run the deferred live rows on the disposable stack (./smackerel.sh test integration / e2e / e2e-ui).

requirementsRecovery.decision: Digest reads the single operator-owned global corpus through explicit role/grant access and makes no tenant/user row-isolation claim.

scopeProgress.name: Digest Ownership And Freshness Contract Gate

executionHistory.summary: Reconciled the UX-owned Digest contract with desktop and mobile wireframes; distinct loading, current, quiet, selected-date-empty, first-use-empty, stale, unauthorized, read-error, and retry states; date/source interaction rules; keyboard and screen-reader behavior; real-stack Playwright-visible outcomes; and routed design questions. No implementation, database or browser execution, evidence, certification, status transition, commit, push, build, or deployment is claimed.

Replaced the initialization design with a code-grounded typed Digest architecture: the legacy page consumes the canonical digest.Generator reader, PostgreSQL DATE and TIMESTAMPTZ values remain typed, only wrapped pgx.ErrNoRows maps to empty, all other read failures are explicit, states and telemetry are closed and privacy-safe, real-PostgreSQL Playwright validation is required, and rollback is schema-free. No spec, scope, report, user validation, scenario manifest, source, test, certification, status transition, commit, push, build, or deployment change is claimed.

Reconciled SR-006/GRILL-12: Digest reads the single operator-owned global corpus through explicit role/grant access, forbids ungranted private-content and existence disclosure, and makes no tenant/user row-isolation claim. Preserved SCN-002-007-01..08. No source, test, design, scope, report, user validation, certification, commit, push, or deployment work is claimed.

Reconciled design.md to the analyst-owned global-corpus decision: operator/digest:read authorization precedes web/API reads, configured operator/digest:generate authorization precedes generation, denial leaks no existence metadata, typed DATE/TIMESTAMPTZ scans and non-no-row errors stay explicit, no storage migration number is reserved, rollback is data-neutral and cannot restore false-empty or grant bypass, first-slice auth/privacy/error/observability obligations are explicit, and DIGEST-FP-DB-SCAN-001 defines isolated real-PostgreSQL no-interception fault proof. Focused artifact lint passed. No spec, scope, report, user validation, scenario manifest, source, test, config, certification, status transition, commit, push, build, deployment, or spec 079 change is claimed.

Planning reconciliation (spec-scope-hardening harden): re-derived scopes.md, scenario-manifest.json, and report.md against the revised spec.md/design.md (both 2026-07-24T05:46Z). Reframed Scope 01 SCN-002-007-10 from the superseded product-session-versus-per-user ratification to the design-resolved model — one operator-owned global corpus gated by digest:read/digest:generate with no tenant/per-user row isolation — and aligned Scope 02's reader plan. Regenerated scenario-manifest.json from 8 stale SCOPE-01 entries to 10 scenarios across SCOPE-01..04 with existing linked-test anchors (removed the nonexistent web/pwa/tests/digest.spec.ts) and spec-matching titles. Recorded concrete canary anchors in report.md and expanded certification.scopeProgress to the four planned scopes. Kept status in_progress; no source, test, spec, design, certification, commit, push, or deployment change is claimed.

Implemented the disjoint unit-verifiable false-empty core per operator directive. NEW internal/web/digest_model.go: DigestReader seam + closed DigestViewState/DigestReadErrorKind + concrete DigestPageModel + pure classifyDigest (only a wrapped pgx.ErrNoRows is empty; every other fault is read_error with cleared fields; stale only when the freshness threshold is configured). Rewrote internal/web/handler.go::DigestPage onto the injected reader, removing the duplicate DATE-to-string-scan + time.Now() false-empty catch-all; added the Handler DigestReader/DigestStaleAfter/ClockOverride seams + now(). Expanded internal/web/templates.go digest.html to mutually-exclusive typed states. Injected svc.digestGen as the reader in cmd/core/services.go (DigestStaleAfter left 0 = inert until Scope 01 config lands). Upgraded the non-guarding TestDigestPage_NoRows into a real nil-reader read_error guard and added internal/web/digest_state_test.go (classify state matrix + DigestPage HTTP truthful-state matrix, including the exact error->500 read_error regression that fails against the old code). ./smackerel.sh test unit --go passed (go test ./... exit 0; 7 targeted tests PASS incl. the 002-006 search regression), ./smackerel.sh check exit 0, ./smackerel.sh lint exit 0. DEFERRED: Scope 01 config-SST (coordination-required — internal/config/config.go, internal/config/validate_test.go, config/smackerel.yaml, scripts/commands/config.sh owned by a concurrent agent) and ALL live-stack rows (integration/e2e-api/e2e-ui incl. the unauthorized/grant boundary and Scope 04). No config/telemetry/live/foreign source touched; no git operations performed.

statusDiscipline.scopePickupRule: All dependsOn scopes must be Done. Pick the lowest-numbered eligible scope.
statusDiscipline.specDoneRequires: All scopes done and validate-owned certification permits promotion.

notes: Owner routes required: bubbles.ux, bubbles.design, bubbles.plan. Blocks spec 106 Digest and BUG-102-001 journey acceptance.
